context.contextBlock: Sign-in beat; captures the user name. Coach stays silent (see beatContexts).
Ask permission to use the microphone so the user can talk out loud. If they allow, continue warmly. If not now, continue without pushing.

componentProps.heading: Allow your microphone
componentProps.sub: So you can talk with your coach out loud.

voice.openerText: I'd love to actually talk with you. If you let me use your mic, you can just speak.

mp3Assets.label: mic_permission_1
mp3Assets.transcript: I'd love to actually talk with you. If you let me use your mic, you can just speak.

lines.text: I'd love to actually talk with you. If you let me use your mic, you can just speak.

context.contextBlock: Profile beat: age + gender only. Name comes from auth (see beatContexts).

voice.openerText:
Good to meet you, {name}. Two quick things so I can tailor this to you.
How old are you?
What's your gender?

mp3Assets.label: onboard_01_form_1
mp3Assets.transcript: How old are you?

mp3Assets.label: onboard_01_form_2
mp3Assets.transcript: What's your gender?

lines.text: Good to meet you, {name}. Two quick things so I can tailor this to you.

context.contextBlock: The user does their very first check-in right now. Four dimensions: mood, energy, sleep, stress. Accept spoken or tapped answers. Do not over-explain; keep it brief and warm.

voice.openerText: I'd like to invite you into a coaching process. It's built on a few small pieces we'll go through together. Here's the first, a quick state check-in, and I'd like you to do it right now.

mp3Assets.label: onboard_state_check_1
mp3Assets.transcript: I'd like to invite you into a coaching process. It's built on a few small pieces we'll go through together. Here's the first, a quick state check-in, and I'd like you to do it right now.

mp3Assets.label: state_sleep
mp3Assets.transcript: How's your sleep?

mp3Assets.label: state_mood
mp3Assets.transcript: How's your mood?

mp3Assets.label: state_energy
mp3Assets.transcript: How's your energy?

mp3Assets.label: state_stress
mp3Assets.transcript: How's your stress?

lines.text: I'd like to invite you into a coaching process. It's built on a few small pieces we'll go through together. Here's the first, a quick state check-in, and I'd like you to do it right now.

narration.say: I'd like to invite you into a coaching process. It's built on a few small pieces we'll go through together. Here's the first, a quick state check-in, and I'd like you to do it right now.
How's your sleep?
How's your mood?
How's your energy?
How's your stress?

context.contextBlock: Set up a short morning check-in: when they want the nudge, which days, and whether they want a reminder. Keep it light, a quick way to start the day with intention.

voice.openerText: Part of the coaching process is doing this each day. It gives us two things. First, it's a real quick check-in on how your state is, which is valuable, and people don't usually do it enough. And second, over time it lets us see the connection between your behavior and your state. So when would you like to do this each morning? I recommend 15 minutes after you wake up.

mp3Assets.label: onboard_morning_setup_1
mp3Assets.transcript: Part of the coaching process is doing this each day. It gives us two things. First, it's a real quick check-in on how your state is, which is valuable, and people don't usually do it enough. And second, over time it lets us see the connection between your behavior and your state. So when would you like to do this each morning? I recommend 15 minutes after you wake up.

mp3Assets.label: onboard_morning_setup_2
mp3Assets.transcript: Every single day is great. But doing weekdays consistently is better than every day inconsistently. So that's what I recommend to start. But you're welcome to add the weekend as well.

lines.text: Part of the coaching process is doing this each day. It gives us two things. First, it's a real quick check-in on how your state is, which is valuable, and people don't usually do it enough. And second, over time it lets us see the connection between your behavior and your state. So when would you like to do this each morning? I recommend 15 minutes after you wake up.

narration.say: Part of the coaching process is doing this each day. It gives us two things. First, it's a real quick check-in on how your state is, which is valuable, and people don't usually do it enough. And second, over time it lets us see the connection between your behavior and your state. So when would you like to do this each morning? I recommend 15 minutes after you wake up.
Every single day is great. But doing weekdays consistently is better than every day inconsistently. So that's what I recommend to start. But you're welcome to add the weekend as well.

context.contextBlock: Set up a short evening reflection: when, which days, whether they want a reminder, and the style (guided prompts, custom prompts, or freeform). Frame it as a moment for their mind, not a chore.

voice.openerText: One more. An evening reflection, a minute and a half to close out your day. Use these three questions.

mp3Assets.label: onboard_beginner_07_1
mp3Assets.transcript: One more. An evening reflection, a minute and a half to close out your day. Use these three questions.

mp3Assets.label: reflect_proud
mp3Assets.transcript: What am I proud of?

mp3Assets.label: reflect_forgive
mp3Assets.transcript: What do I forgive myself for?

mp3Assets.label: reflect_grateful
mp3Assets.transcript: What am I grateful for?

mp3Assets.label: reflect_alt
mp3Assets.transcript: Or make your own, or just talk freely.

mp3Assets.label: reflect_time
mp3Assets.transcript: I'd recommend doing this before bed, maybe 15 minutes before you wind down.

lines.text: One more. An evening reflection, a minute and a half to close out your day. Use these three questions.

narration.say: One more. An evening reflection, a minute and a half to close out your day. Use these three questions.
What am I proud of?
What do I forgive myself for?
What am I grateful for?
Or make your own, or just talk freely.
I'd recommend doing this before bed, maybe 15 minutes before you wind down.

context.contextBlock: Ask how they like to work: you can guide them step by step, or they can tell you everything on their mind and you organize it. Record their choice and continue. Do not explain the difference unless they ask.

options.label: I already track habits
options.description: Read me your list and we'll get it organized.

options.label: I'm new to this
options.description: We'll start fresh and build your first habits together.

voice.openerText: One more question before we set up your habits.

mp3Assets.label: onboard_fork_form_1
mp3Assets.transcript: One more question before we set up your habits.

mp3Assets.label: fork_question
mp3Assets.transcript: Do you already track habits or is this new to you?

lines.text: One more question before we set up your habits.

narration.say: One more question before we set up your habits.
Do you already track habits or is this new to you?

context.contextBlock: The user picks one life area to focus on first. React to the one they choose, specifically. Do not pick for them.

voice.openerText: Let's choose one area of your life that you'd like to improve on. Here are our recommended categories.

mp3Assets.label: onboard_beginner_01_1
mp3Assets.transcript: Let's choose one area of your life that you'd like to improve on. Here are our recommended categories.

mp3Assets.label: create_your_own
mp3Assets.transcript: Or you can create your own.

lines.text: Let's choose one area of your life that you'd like to improve on. Here are our recommended categories.

narration.say: Let's choose one area of your life that you'd like to improve on. Here are our recommended categories.
Or you can create your own.

context.contextBlock: Narrow the focus area into one or two specific goals. Keep it to two at most so they are not overwhelmed.

voice.openerText: So within that, which goals would you like to start with? Pick one or two.

mp3Assets.label: onboard_beginner_02_1
mp3Assets.transcript: So within that, which goals would you like to start with? Pick one or two.

lines.text: So within that, which goals would you like to start with? Pick one or two.

context.contextBlock: Help them pick up to two small daily habits to start with. Small and doable beats ambitious. They can always add more later.

voice.openerText: Pick one or two habits that feel doable. One habit that you actually keep is much better than a list of five that you don't keep. Create your own if nothing here fits.

mp3Assets.label: onboard_beginner_03_1
mp3Assets.transcript: Pick one or two habits that feel doable. One habit that you actually keep is much better than a list of five that you don't keep. Create your own if nothing here fits.

lines.text: Pick one or two habits that feel doable. One habit that you actually keep is much better than a list of five that you don't keep. Create your own if nothing here fits.

context.contextBlock: For each habit they chose, set when they will do it: a time, which days, and whether they want a reminder. Parse combined answers when you can. Ask only for the piece that is missing.

voice.openerText: Please set the days that you're going to actually do these habits.

mp3Assets.label: onboard_beginner_04_1
mp3Assets.transcript: Please set the days that you're going to actually do these habits.

mp3Assets.label: onboard_beginner_04_2
mp3Assets.transcript: Not every habit needs to be done every day. Three specific days in the week is great as well. Once a week for specific habits, also great.

lines.text: Please set the days that you're going to actually do these habits.

narration.say: Please set the days that you're going to actually do these habits.
Not every habit needs to be done every day. Three specific days in the week is great as well. Once a week for specific habits, also great.

context.contextBlock: The user wants to tell you everything on their mind at once. Let them. Listen for the habits and goals inside it; do not interrupt with structure yet.

componentProps.placeholder: Tell me everything on your mind, what you want to build, drop, or change.

voice.openerText: Read me the habits you already track. We'll pick days next. For now just the list, and I recommend starting small, you can always add more.

mp3Assets.label: onboard_advanced_1
mp3Assets.transcript: Read me the habits you already track. We'll pick days next. For now just the list, and I recommend starting small, you can always add more.

mp3Assets.label: close
mp3Assets.transcript: Those are all in, and I marked each as build or break. Tell me if any look wrong. If they're good, we'll set the days next.

lines.text: Read me the habits you already track. We'll pick days next. For now just the list, and I recommend starting small, you can always add more.

narration.say: Read me the habits you already track. We'll pick days next. For now just the list, and I recommend starting small, you can always add more.
Those are all in, and I marked each as build or break. Tell me if any look wrong. If they're good, we'll set the days next.

context.contextBlock: For each habit in the braindump, set how often it runs. Parse spoken answers when you can. Ask only for missing pieces.

voice.openerText: Please set the days that you're going to actually do these habits.

mp3Assets.label: onboard_beginner_04_1
mp3Assets.transcript: Please set the days that you're going to actually do these habits.

mp3Assets.label: onboard_advanced_frequency_1
mp3Assets.transcript: Not every habit needs to be done every day. Specific days in the week is great as well. Once a week for a certain habit, also great.

mp3Assets.label: onboard_advanced_frequency_2
mp3Assets.transcript: Your habits are all set, your plan is ready.

lines.text: Please set the days that you're going to actually do these habits.

narration.say: Please set the days that you're going to actually do these habits.
Not every habit needs to be done every day. Specific days in the week is great as well. Once a week for a certain habit, also great.
Your habits are all set, your plan is ready.

context.contextBlock: Onboarding is done. Warmly tell the user they are all set and take them in. Do not collect anything else.

voice.openerText: Here's your plan. Your check-in, your reflection, and the habits you picked. Want to start here, or change anything first?

mp3Assets.label: onboard_complete_1
mp3Assets.transcript: Here's your plan. Your check-in, your reflection, and the habits you picked. Want to start here, or change anything first?

lines.text: Here's your plan. Your check-in, your reflection, and the habits you picked. Want to start here, or change anything first?

context.contextBlock: A visual projection of the habit week. Show five states in sequence; no user input needed.

voice.openerText: This is your week. Blank, starting today.

mp3Assets.label: onboard_weekly_projection_blank_1
mp3Assets.transcript: This is your week. Blank, starting today.

lines.text: This is your week. Blank, starting today.

context.contextBlock: A visual projection of the habit week. Show five states in sequence; no user input needed.

voice.openerText: Best case, every day green. 100% success. That would be amazing.

mp3Assets.label: onboard_weekly_projection_full_1
mp3Assets.transcript: Best case, every day green. 100% success. That would be amazing.

lines.text: Best case, every day green. 100% success. That would be amazing.

context.contextBlock: A visual projection of the habit week. Show five states in sequence; no user input needed.

voice.openerText: Most likely your week looks somewhere around here. Mostly green, a few misses. Still a real win.

mp3Assets.label: onboard_weekly_projection_p78_1
mp3Assets.transcript: Most likely your week looks somewhere around here. Mostly green, a few misses. Still a real win.

lines.text: Most likely your week looks somewhere around here. Mostly green, a few misses. Still a real win.

context.contextBlock: A visual projection of the habit week. Show five states in sequence; no user input needed.

voice.openerText: Some weeks can look like this. And even that's okay, because you're in the process and you're consistent inside the process.

mp3Assets.label: onboard_weekly_projection_p36_1
mp3Assets.transcript: Some weeks can look like this. And even that's okay, because you're in the process and you're consistent inside the process.

lines.text: Some weeks can look like this. And even that's okay, because you're in the process and you're consistent inside the process.

context.contextBlock: A visual projection of the habit week. Show five states in sequence; no user input needed.

voice.openerText: The one thing you want to avoid is this. The empty days you never reported. Stay consistent, just report it. Even a miss counts. That keeps the momentum going.

mp3Assets.label: onboard_weekly_projection_gaps_1
mp3Assets.transcript: The one thing you want to avoid is this. The empty days you never reported. Stay consistent, just report it. Even a miss counts. That keeps the momentum going.

lines.text: The one thing you want to avoid is this. The empty days you never reported. Stay consistent, just report it. Even a miss counts. That keeps the momentum going.

mp3Assets.label: onboard_beginner_02_custom_1
mp3Assets.transcript: What goal do you want to work toward?

lines.text: What goal do you want to work toward?
